raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Woj tu dohmu waldiht/
tapehz ka tu ar Zeedru-Kohkeem
gresnojees? Neggi taws Tehwe
irr ehdis un dsehris? un irr Teefu
un Tatknibu darrijs/un to Brih-
di winnam labbi klahjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch isdewe tam Nab-
bagaim un Behdigaim Teefu/ tad
winnam labbi klahjahs. Neggi
ir tas to darra manni atsiht? jak-
ka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tawas Azzis un ta-
wa Girds stahw us neneeka/ ka
ween uhs to Neggansibu/ un uhs
nenoseedsigu Affins Isleejchanu/
uhs Apbehdinaschanu/ un uhs
Sadausifchanu to padarriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ta jakka tas
KUNGS no Jojakima/ ta Deh-
la Josijus/ ta Rehnina no Juw-
da: Tee ne noschehlohs winnu/
(un lazzih8:) Ak mans Brah-
li! ak Mahfa! tee winnu ne no-
schehlohs: Ak Kunge! ak Zee-
nigajs!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ka weens Ehseitsap.
rakts fkubst/ ta fkuhs wiꞥſch
aprakts/ wiꞥſch taps rausthts
un atmests tahfu no Jerusale-
nes Wahrtun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kaht uhs to Libbanu/ un
jauzt/ un pazellt tawu Balsi
Bahsana/ un brehz no Abarti-
ma/ jo wiꞥſt tawi Mihletaji irr
fatreekt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es runnaju uhs tewt/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "kad tew labbi klahjahs/ bet
fazziji: Es ne klaufsichu. Sch
irr tarws Zetsch no tawas Ja-
nibas/ ka tu mannai Balktu
ne efi klaufsigs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Wehisch barro-
wiffus tawus Gaunus/ un ta-
Mihletaji eeß Zeetuma/ tad ta-
fi tu teefcham Rauna un par A-
fincekli/ wiffas tawas Blehd-
bas Deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kaß tu eekich Libban-
dshwo/ un eekich Zeedru-Ko-
keen Ligsdas darri/ ka labbi te-
klahfees? kad tew Sahpes
ieeß/ Mohkas/ ka weennai/ k-
dsemde?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tik teefcham ka es df-
woju/ jakka tas KUNGS
Jepfchu Kantius Jojakim
Dehts/ tas Rehninaßch no Juwda
weens speeschamajs Gredse-
buhtu pee mannas labbas Ro-
kas/ tomehr gribbu es tewi-
teunnegs noraut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Unes nodohschu tewite-
Rohkâ/ kas tawu Dwehfeli ma-
le/ un teem Rohkâ/ preek-
ka Waiga tu bibstees/ proh-
Nebukadnezara/ ta Rehnina
no Babels/ un to Kaldee-
Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es ismettischu ten-
un tawu Mahti/ kas tewi-
dsemdesji/ zittâ Semmê/ k-
jubs ne effeet dsimmutchi/ unt-
buhs jums nomirt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tai Semmê/ ku-
winnu Divehfelei gribbefees a-
gr
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
